title: Village Farms International Reports Strong Q1/24 Results
text: Village Farms Q1 2024 EPS was $0.02, in-line with analyst estimate. Revenue was $50.24 million versus the consensus estimate of $49.41 million. This compares to a loss of $0.06 per share a year ago. Q1 was an especially strong start to 2024 with Canadian Cannabis retail branded sales growing 28% year-over-year, all organically. The company led the top five LPs in market share growth. Completion of internalization of gummy production was on track for the second quarter of 2024. The Delta, British Columbia Renewable Natural Gas Project began operations, immediately contributing incremental profitability to the Company.
